background: Homeworld: Faslane (Alpha Crucis 1619 — Low Population, frontier mining world). A cold world at the edge of Confederation space where the nearest government response is three days away and self-sufficiency is survival. Joined the Marines at 18, rotated through Recon, recruited to Army Intelligence for protective operations, eventually arrived at SolSec as a field security specialist. Has been in more firefights than he has names for. Does not discuss any of them. Currently 23 days into BLIND SERPENT operation at Lakamsal (SR 3218) — responsible for perimeter security and external threat response.
education: Faslane frontier schooling. Confederation Marines Recon qualification. Army Infantry advanced combat certification.
terms: Marines (Recon): Gun Combat (energy)-1, Recon-1, Stealth-1, Athletics (endurance)-1. Marine Recon qualification. Advanced to rank 1. Mustered out after single term to join Army.
Army (Infantry): Gun Combat (energy)-2, Melee (blade)-1, Survival-1, Drive (wheeled)-1. Infantry combat, multiple engagements. Advanced to rank 1.
Army (Infantry, Recon): Recon-2, Stealth-2, Athletics (endurance)-2, Electronics (sensors)-1. Recon specialisation, protective operations. Advanced to rank 2.

Army (Recon): Gun Combat (energy)-3, Recon-3, Melee (blade)-2, Survival-2, Heavy Weapons (portable)-1, Explosives-0, Medic-0. SolSec Field Security — protective detail and perimeter operations. Advanced to rank 3 (SFC). Mustering out: Advanced Combat Rifle, Laser Pistol, Combat Armour, Thermal Camouflage Suit, Explosive Charges x4, 1,000 Credits (untraceable).
interactions: Role: Security / Perimeter Specialist — physical security of BLIND SERPENT station, external threat management, counter-megafauna if required. Checks perimeter sensors every 20 minutes regardless of whether they need checking.

Personality: Quiet. Watchful. Uncomfortable when not moving or not useful. Not afraid of megafauna — grew up around things that could kill him. Somewhat unsettled by the signals and intelligence work others do, which he finds abstract.
Relationship to team: Protective in a way he would not describe as protective. Would follow Vasiliou into a burning starport without question.
Scenario role: Acts as the team's response when threats go physical. The only team member who can reliably engage either megafauna or Marines at close range.

armour.name: Combat Armour
armour.traits: TL10, sealed — protects against atmospheric trace volatiles

armour.name: Thermal Camouflage Suit
armour.traits: DM+3 Stealth vs thermal sensors while stationary

equipment.name: Explosive Charges x4
equipment.traits: Explosives 2 to set correctly, 4D damage, 10m blast radius

contacts.kind: Major Sera Vasiliou (BLIND SERPENT Cell Commander — absolute trust)
SolSec Field Security (prior protective operations, unnamed handlers)
